§ 01Assessment Result

Dear {{brokerName}},

Thank you for submitting the listing for {{companyName}}. We have completed our initial qualification assessment based on the information provided.

{{#if fitsCriteria}}
Qualifies
This Opportunity Meets Our Criteria

Based on the information provided, this opportunity aligns with Forhemit's qualification parameters for ESOP transition stewardship. We are interested in proceeding with a preliminary discussion.

{{else}}
Does Not Qualify
This Opportunity Does Not Meet Our Criteria

After careful review, this opportunity does not currently align with Forhemit's qualification parameters. We appreciate you thinking of us and welcome future submissions.

{{/if}}
§ 02Assessment Details

Our qualification assessment evaluates the following key criteria:

01EBITDA Range: {{ebitdaRange}} — {{ebitdaStatus}}
02Industry Fit: {{industryFit}} — {{industryStatus}}
03Ownership Structure: {{ownershipStructure}} — {{ownershipStatus}}
04Geographic Location: {{location}} — {{locationStatus}}
05Management Depth: {{managementDepth}} — {{managementStatus}}
{{#if fitsCriteria}}
Next Step: We would like to schedule a brief introductory call to learn more about the business and discuss the ESOP transition process. Please reply with your availability for a 20-minute call this week or next.
{{else}}
Feedback: {{declineReason}} We encourage you to submit other opportunities that may be a better fit for our program.
{{/if}}
§ 03Our Qualification Criteria

For reference, Forhemit's standard qualification parameters include:

A.EBITDA: $1M–$15M (QofE-normalized, trailing twelve months)
B.Industry: Manufacturing, professional services, healthcare, or distribution
C.Ownership: Owner-operator seeking full or partial exit
D.Structure: LLC, S-Corp, or C-Corp (LLC requires conversion)
E.Employees: 15+ W-2 employees with management depth
§ 04Contact

If you have questions about this assessment or would like to discuss other opportunities, please contact:

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}

Please reference the above number in all correspondence related to this submission.

—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Stewardship Management Co.
California Public Benefit Corporation
